blockingIssues.description: TextTyper was added and tested in isolation but never integrated into the production typeless transcription flow or DI container, so no incremental text delivery can occur.

TypelessController accumulates SSE chunks and writes history, but never types or pastes the transcription into the focused application or clipboard, leaving the core user-visible behavior unimplemented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When scrutiny review subagents fail to launch because of environment/model configuration, the validator skill should explicitly allow a local fallback review path so the mission can still produce required review artifacts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four Task launches for scrutiny-feature-reviewer failed with 'Invalid model: custom:gpt-5.4-local', requiring manual creation of the review JSON files in this run.
